features.description: Establish the site development workflow contract, including the repository role boundary, workflow state files, and the verification entrypoint.
Add repository contract tests that protect the Obsidian-to-Hugo publishing boundary and the Selected summary CSS regression.
Document the workflow-driven requirement, planning, coding, and evaluation loop for future site changes.
Update the Projects page Gentle Memories entry to show community review approval and link to the public Obsidian review page.
Refine article code block rendering with GitHub-style syntax highlighting, readable typography, hidden text labels, and inline-code-matched block backgrounds.
Refresh the public About and Resume pages with resume-informed professional copy, privacy-safe public profile content, and code-block-aligned terminal styling.
